models.name: USDZ Mobile Globe Detail Fixed
models.description: Preferred fixed export combining GOES globe context, AWE swath data, and GNSS/ISS spatial reference with preserved hierarchy and an 8K USDZ texture cap.

models.name: USDZ Mobile Globe Detail ISS High
models.description: Higher-detail ISS variant for GOES globe context, AWE swath data, and GNSS/ISS spatial reference, preserving solar panel and structure geometry.

models.name: AWE Displacement Light
models.description: Light AWE swath displacement variant with GOES globe context and GNSS/ISS spatial reference, using baked MATLAB height data.

models.name: AWE Displacement Medium
models.description: Medium AWE swath displacement variant with GOES globe context and GNSS/ISS spatial reference, using baked MATLAB height data.

models.name: Supercell Storms on March 11th, 2026
models.description: Q-line radiance that AWE measured when it flew over a system of storms in the Northeastern USA.
